data.title: U.S. Seizes Darknet, Internet Domains, Crypto Funds Tied to Illegal Trading in Credit Card Data
data.description:
The U.S. seized 145 darknet and internet domains as well as cryptocurrency funds linked to BidenCash, a market for buying and selling stolen credit card details and associated personal information, the Attorney’s Office for the Eastern District of Virginia said on Wednesday.The marketplace accumulated revenue of $17 million from supporting over 117,000 customers and traded more than 15 million payment card numbers since it began operating in 2022, the attorney’s office said
source: https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2025/06/05/us-seizes-darknet-internet-domains-crypto-funds-tied-to-illegal-trading-in-credit-card-data

data.title: Musk criticizes Trump tax cut bill, says it will lead to 'debt slavery'
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Tesla CEO Elon Musk publicly criticized the Trump administration's latest comprehensive tax cut bill this week, saying it would lead to "debt slavery" and hinted that Bitcoin (BTC) should become the US reserve currency. The bill will add $2.4 trillion to the national debt and cut $3.75 trillion in taxes, and is expected to cause 7.8 million people to lose their health insurance qualifications. Musk called the bill a "disgusting monster" and attached an American flag emoji in response to Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong's Bitcoin remarks. (Reuters)

data.title: Tether Invests in African Blockchain Platform Shiga Digital
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Tether, the issuer of USDT, has announced a strategic investment in the African blockchain financial platform Shiga Digital. The specific amount of the investment has not been disclosed. Shiga Digital provides virtual accounts, over-the-counter trading services, fund management, and foreign exchange services to African businesses. This collaboration aims to address the longstanding challenges faced by African enterprises in cross-border payments and global liquidity access through a blockchain financial infrastructure based on USDT
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/25214166731602?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Tether Invests in African Blockchain Platform Shiga Digital
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Tether, the issuer of USDT, has announced a strategic investment in the African blockchain financial platform Shiga Digital. The specific amount of the investment has not been disclosed. Shiga Digital provides virtual accounts, over-the-counter trading services, fund management, and foreign exchange services to African businesses.

This collaboration aims to address the longstanding challenges faced by African enterprises in cross-border payments and global liquidity access through a blockchain financial infrastructure based on USDT. Both parties will support the management of funds and foreign exchange for traditional industries such as oil and gas within and outside Africa. Additionally, they will assist independent contractors in easily accessing foreign currency and global payment services.

data.title: Tesla Faces Financial Impact from New Tax Legislation
data.description: According to Odaily, recent reports indicate that U.S. President Donald Trump's significant tax legislation will largely eliminate the $7,500 tax credit for certain Tesla models and other electric vehicle buyers by the end of this year, seven years earlier than initially planned. Analysts from JPMorgan suggest this change could result in a $1.2 billion hit to Tesla's annual profits. Following his departure from an official advisory role at the White House last week, Elon Musk has been actively opposing the President's signing of the tax bill, describing it as "disgusting." Musk has been lobbying Republican lawmakers, including making direct appeals to House Speaker Johnson, to retain the electric vehicle tax credits in the legislation.

data.title: Bonkbot: Solana’s Lightning-Fast Telegram Trading Bot
data.description:
Bonkbot is a non-custodial, Telegram-based Solana trading bot that enables lightning-fast token swaps, advanced order types, and secure wallet integration.

The post Bonkbot: Solana’s Lightning-Fast Telegram Trading Bot first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/06/05/bonkbot-what-is-it-guide/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=bonkbot-what-is-it-guide

data.title: Crypto Today: Circle Makes NYSE Debut, JPMorgan Eyes Crypto ETF Loans, and Stablecoins Surge
data.description: Circle Goes Public on NYSE After $1.05B IPO BoostCircle, the issuer behind USD Coin (USDC) — the world’s second-largest stablecoin — officially began trading under ticker CRCL on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) today, June 5.The IPO was upsized several times due to strong investor demand, ultimately pricing 34 million shares at $31 each, valuing the company at $6.9 billion.Originally, Circle targeted 24 million shares at $24–$26. The final price range marked its third attempt to go public after delays in April due to Trump-era tariff fears.Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire called the listing a milestone for “upgrading the world to an internet-native financial system.”Industry leaders like Michael Saylor and Coinbase’s Paul Grewal congratulated the team on X.📈 Key Numbers:Shares offered: 34 millionIPO value: $1.05 billionValuation: $6.9 billionTicker: CRCLJPMorgan to Accept Crypto ETFs as Loan CollateralJPMorgan, the largest U.S. bank by assets, will reportedly allow clients to borrow against crypto ETFs in the coming weeks, according to Bloomberg (June 4).The initiative starts with BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) — currently the largest spot BTC ETF in the U.S. with $70.1B in net assets.This move signals growing institutional comfort with treating crypto-backed ETFs like traditional securities.Clients’ digital assets may now count toward net worth calculations for loan eligibility.🔍 Why It Matters:This marks a major leap in crypto's mainstream integration with traditional finance, allowing more liquidity options for wealthy investors holding digital assets.Today’s Crypto Market PulseStablecoins are in focus as Circle debuts on Wall Street, highlighting the rising importance of tokenized dollars in global finance.Ethereum’s resurgence as a DeFi and stablecoin hub continues, with $480B in stablecoin volume recorded in May.Bitcoin hovers near $104,800, with analysts citing tariff uncertainty as a key short-term risk.Key Takeaways for Crypto InvestorsEventImpactCircle NYSE DebutSignals growing trust in stablecoin-backed businessesJPMorgan's ETF Loan PlanEnhances crypto liquidity and wealth management use casesStablecoin AdoptionFuels Ethereum’s comeback and DeFi evolution

data.title: Bitcoin News: Bitcoin Hash Ribbons Flash Rare ‘Buy’ Signal for 3rd Time in 2025 — Is Another Rally Coming?
data.description: Hash Ribbons Turns Green: A Historically Accurate Bitcoin SignalThe Hash Ribbons indicator — a trusted long-term metric that tracks miner capitulation and recovery — has just flashed its third “buy” signal in 2025, according to CryptoQuant. Historically, this indicator has accurately identified market bottoms, signaling ideal entry points for long-term investors.The signal suggests that despite Bitcoin's recent all-time highs, current prices may still offer attractive long-term upside.CryptoQuant analyst Darkfost noted that the market has largely overlooked the signal, calling it a “smart move” to buy the dip now.How it works:Hash Ribbons measure the 30-day and 60-day moving averages of Bitcoin’s network hashrate. When the shorter-term average crosses above the longer one after a miner capitulation phase, it indicates that mining recovery is underway — often preceding upward price movement.Miner Behavior Supports Bullish OutlookBitcoin miner reserves are steady at ~1.8 million BTC as of June 4, suggesting reduced selling pressure after aggressive distribution in 2024.The Bitcoin hashrate has reached new all-time highs, confirming strong network security and miner confidence.Why It Matters:Miners often act as early indicators of market strength or weakness. When they hold rather than sell, it hints at expectation of further price increases.Profit-Taking Fades Amid Market MaturityWhile some Bitcoin whales and long-term holders have locked in profits, Glassnode’s latest onchain report reveals that profit-taking euphoria is fading:The 90-day average of realized profits shows that BTC holders are becoming more strategic and less emotional, signaling a maturing market with lower volatility.“Profit-taking is now less intense than in past cycles,” Glassnode noted. “This trend shows more nuanced, less euphoric behavior as Bitcoin grows into a major macro asset.”BTC Market Outlook: Key TakeawaysSignal/EventImplicationHash Ribbons Buy SignalIndicates strong long-term accumulation opportunityMiner Reserves SteadyReduced sell pressure supports price stabilityRecord HashrateSignals confidence and resilience in the Bitcoin networkDiminished Profit-TakingSuggests market maturity and measured optimism With BTC trading near $104,768, all eyes are on macro factors — including tariff uncertainty and potential Fed rate cuts — to determine whether this Hash Ribbons signal precedes another major leg up.Next Key Level: Watch for sustained consolidation above $105K to confirm bullish continuation, according to Cointelegraph.

data.title: Analyst: Trump's tax bill could cost Tesla $1.2 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that by the end of this year, Trump's huge tax bill will largely eliminate the tax credit of up to $7,500 for some Tesla models and other electric vehicle buyers, seven years earlier than originally planned. Analysts at JPMorgan Chase said this would deal a blow to Tesla's full-year profits of about $1.2 billion. After leaving his official White House adviser position last week, Musk has been preventing the president from signing the tax bill, which he called "disgusting." Musk has been lobbying Republican lawmakers-including a direct appeal to House Speaker Johnson to keep electric vehicle tax credits in the legislation. (Jinshi)
